# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd-demo
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-sa
  namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-sa
  namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "1"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "0.1"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: nginx:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: frontend

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: backend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/skip-outbound-ports: "3306,5432"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "info,linkerd=debug"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-sa
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: nginx:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: http

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: backend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: backend

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/enable-debug-sidecar: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway-sa
      containers:
      - name: api-gateway
        image: nginx:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
          name: http

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: linkerd-demo
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8000
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: api-gateway

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8000
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: backend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: frontend-sa
    namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: gateway-to-frontend
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: frontend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: api-gateway-sa
    namespace: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: gateway-public-access
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - kind: NetworkAuthentication
    name: all-unauthenticated

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: all-unauthenticated
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  networks:
  - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
  - cidr: ::/0

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-mtls
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  identities:
  - "frontend-sa.linkerd-demo.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-mtls-policy
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: backend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
    name: backend-mtls

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-route
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: backend
    kind: Service
    group: core
    port: 9090
  rules:
  - matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /api
    backendRefs:
    - name: backend
      port: 9090

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-api-access
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: backend-route
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: frontend-sa

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-admin-server
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: linkerd-demo
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Namespace
    name: linkerd-demo

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd-demo
data:
  proxy-config: |
    proxyVersion: stable-2.14.0
    enableExternalProfiles: true
    enableH2Upgrade: true
    disableIdentity: false
    identityTrustDomain: cluster.local
